themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And Joshua said unto them, Fear not, nor be dismayed, be strong and of good courage: for thus...". Word-study detail reinforces "תִּירָ֣א: Fear - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
